title: Define execution option graph schema and validator
description: Define versioned schema for atomic/composite options and typed edges. Add validation for unknown nodes, invalid edge types, and cycle detection.
acceptance_criteria: Schema exists and is documented; invalid option graphs fail validation with actionable errors; tests cover cycle and missing-node cases. DoD: include commands and evidence in closure notes.

title: Seed execution option catalog from proteins and scripts
description: Create initial option entries for existing protein molecules and core script atoms. Include at least react preflight and design review composites.
acceptance_criteria: Seed catalog compiles under schema validator; react preflight and design review composites resolve to ordered steps; no dangling references. DoD included.

title: Implement execution option resolver and pre-context contract
description: Implement resolver that selects option pathway by task class and constraints, then emits deterministic execution bundle with ordered steps and gates.
acceptance_criteria: Resolver API returns deterministic bundle for identical inputs; alternatives include rationale; contract shape documented and tested. DoD included.

title: Integrate resolver into planning and dispatcher flow
description: Invoke resolver before execution handoff and attach bundle to execution request metadata. Enforce gate that execution only starts with valid resolved bundle.
acceptance_criteria: Planner and dispatcher enforce resolver bundle presence; execution metadata includes selected option and steps; integration tests pass. DoD included.

title: Add planning trace driven option scoring loop
description: Use planning trace outcomes to update option score adjustments and influence future candidate ranking.
acceptance_criteria: Score adjustments persist and are loaded during candidate ranking; plan_agreed and failure events affect scores predictably; tests verify ranking impact. DoD included.
